site.title: Happy Birthday Havs ✨
site.subtitle: The day the world quietly became a little brighter.
site.instruction: Tap a picture to flip it.

memories.title: Memory 8
memories.text:
your laughter follows me around,
through crowded rooms and quiet nights.
And somehow every little thing
feels brighter than before.

memories.title: Memory 9
memories.text:
I'll forever be grateful
for every moment,
every smile,
every memory,
and every piece of love

memories.title: Memory 10
memories.text:
You don't even know
how much of my heart
always feels like home around you.

memories.title: Memory 11
memories.text:
Even when months pass without seeing you,
it still feels like you’ve always been right here,
quietly present in my life, simply by being you.

memories.title: Memory 12
memories.text:
I wish life could take a snapshot of this smile
and keep it with you forever,
because you deserve to smile like this
every single day.

memories.title: Memory 13
memories.text:
I just want your heart to stay light,
Your days to feel warm and bright.
You mean more than I ever show,
And I hope your happiness always grows.
